title: DebitTypeValues
description:
A debit initiated manually by the account holder or an authorized person.

Comment:
Example: Writing a check or instructing a bank teller to withdraw funds.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Automated Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A debit that occurs automatically according to pre-agreed rules, without manual intervention for each transaction.

Comment:
Example: Recurring subscription payments, standing orders.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A debit initiated by a third party (payee) who is authorized by the account holder to collect funds directly.

Comment:
Example: Utility bills, insurance premiums collected by the service provider.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A pre-set debit instruction given by the account holder to the bank to pay a fixed amount regularly to a recipient. Unlike direct debit, the bank executes it automatically.

Comment:
Example: Monthly rent transfers to a landlord.

x-enumeration-literals.name: POS Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Point-of-Sale (POS) Debit: A debit made when a card or payment device is used at a merchant terminal, with immediate deduction from the account.

Commnent:
Example: Grocery or retail purchases using a debit card.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Online Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Debits made through internet banking or mobile apps, initiated by the account holder.

Comment:
Example: Online bill payments or e-commerce purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A debit that occurs only when certain conditions are met, such as account balance thresholds or specific transaction triggers.

Comment:
Example: Automatic transfer to savings when account balance exceeds a limit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Loan/Repayment Debit: Debits specifically linked to loan or credit repayment schedules, often fixed and recurring.

Comment:
Example: Monthly mortgage or personal loan repayments.
